title: February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Unboxing
caption_used:
February 2026 Kitchen XL unboxing, throwback to when that cheeky 2019 Valentine's line first dropped 💕🎁 
Happy Blooming Body Lotion: Valentine's exclusive florals, pure springtime romance 🌸💕 
Aubergine Bath Bomb: OG will remember this iconic cheeky design from 2019 🍆✨ 
Keep it Fluffy Bubble Bar: Cloud-like bubbles that Lush fans absolutely live for ☁️🫧 
Peachy Soap: The companion to Aubergine, fruity and playful as ever 🍑🧼 
Sex in the Shower Emoitbomb: Classic scent in new format, cult favourite vibes 💋🚿 
Two Hearts Shower Gel: Rose florals bringing all the Valentine's nostalgia 💕🌹 
Jasmine Dream Bath Melt: Jasmine heritage meets luxurious moisturising 🌺✨
nostalgia_notes: Happy Blooming body lotion: A Valentine's Kitchen exclusive evoking the romantic, rosy warmth fans associate with special Lush seasonal drops
Happy Blooming body lotion: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box
Happy Blooming body lotion: Likely references the classic Rose Jam scent family, a longtime Valentine's season favourite
Aubergine bath bomb: Floral body lotions are a beloved Lush staple, and a Valentine's seasonal release always carries a sense of occasion for subscribers
Aubergine bath bomb: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box
Keep it fluffy bubble bar: Peachy has a cheeky Valentine's legacy stretching back to 2019, making it a fan-favourite returning seasonal treat
Keep it fluffy bubble bar: The Peachy concept originated in Lush's 2019 Valentine's line alongside the Aubergine bath bomb, becoming one of the most talked-about seasonal releases of that year
Keep it fluffy bubble bar: Companion piece to the iconic Aubergine bath bomb from the 2019 Valentine's collection
Peachy soap: Jasmine-scented Lush products carry a rich heritage, and bath melts are treasured for their deeply moisturising, indulgent soak
Peachy soap: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box
Sex in the Shower Emoitbomb: Sex in the Shower is a long-running Lush product with a devoted following, and seeing it appear in new formats excites loyal fans

Sex in the Shower Emoitbomb: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box; the Emoitbomb format combines emollient oils with an effervescent bomb for use in the shower
Sex in the Shower Emoitbomb: Based on the classic Sex in the Shower solid perfume and body care range

Two Heart shower gel: A cult favourite from Lush's cheeky 2019 Valentine's line, the Aubergine bath bomb became instantly iconic for its phallic design and its uncanny recreation of that beloved Lush shop floor smell

Two Heart shower gel: First released as part of Lush's 2019 Valentine's collection alongside the Peachy bath bomb; the scent is '29 High Street', designed to replicate the signature smell of a Lush store
Two Heart shower gel: Companion to the Peachy bath bomb from the 2019 Valentine's line; shares the 29 High Street scent with other products in that range
Jasmine Dream bath melt: Fluffy, cloud-like bubble bars are a Lush staple that fans adore for their generous mountains of bubbles and lingering scent
Jasmine Dream bath melt: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box
texture_notes: Aubergine bath bomb: fizzing and colour swirls
Keep it fluffy bubble bar: crumbling and foam
Two Heart shower gel: squeeze and lather
